name: skill-inspector
description: Security-inspect an AI agent skill with the skillspector CLI, then render a plain-English verdict report in chat: SAFE / CAUTION / DO_NOT_INSTALL, a threat breakdown, the top findings to check first, and file hotspots. Deep mode adds LLM intent classification; the verdict is capability-clustered and intent-weighted, with confirmed source-to-sink exfiltration chains as the categorical do-not-install trigger. Bundles the render script and flags degraded (static-only) scans so an unreliable verdict is never mistaken for a trustworthy one.
